overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay of a samurai character walking through a rainy night in a traditional Japanese village, illuminated by paper lanterns, before entering a house with a fire-lit interior where a person sleeps by the hearth.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village path with stone lantern and wooden fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow path beside a wooden fence and stone lantern in the rain

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern with glowing warm light on a pedestal
tall wooden fence running alongside the dirt path
wooden building with lit windows visible through the trees
dense trees and bushes lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path in a rainy village at night, passing a glowing stone lantern and wooden fence with traditional buildings visible through the vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional village street with wooden houses and paper lanterns

events.description: passing by villagers sitting near building entrances along the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the main village street passing traditional houses with glowing paper lanterns hanging from eaves

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on wooden steps near a building entrance
figure standing in the distance near a building on the right

entered.detail: wooden house with overhanging roof and paper lantern
wooden building with lit interior and wooden barrels outside
hanging paper lanterns illuminating the wet street
stacked wooden barrels near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wider village street lined with traditional wooden houses, passing villagers sitting near doorways and walking under hanging paper lanterns that cast warm light on the wet ground.

events.description: turning slightly toward the building entrance on the left
character walks up wooden steps and enters the building from the rainy street

agents.ego_description: approaching a specific building on the left and walking up the steps to enter through the doorway

wooden steps leading up to the building entrance
warm orange firelight visible through the open doorway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a traditional house on the left side of the street, walking up wooden steps toward the glowing doorway, leaving the rainy village street behind as they enter the warm interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional house interior with fire pit and sleeping area

events.description: approaching the sleeping person lying on the floor by the fire pit

agents.ego_description: walking slowly inside the house, approaching the central fire pit and observing the sleeping person

entered.detail: square sunken fire pit with burning flames in the center of the room
polished wooden floorboards covering the interior
wooden wall panels with shelves holding various items
pots, baskets, and other items stored near the wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the warm house illuminated by firelight, the character approaches a central fire pit where a person sleeps peacefully on the floor, with wooden walls and household items visible in the flickering light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy, nocturnal village street into the warm, fire-lit sanctuary of a traditional home. It begins by trailing a character along a narrow dirt path past glowing stone lanterns and wooden fences shrouded in vegetation. As the path widens, the scene opens into a village street where hanging paper lanterns cast a warm glow over the wet ground and villagers resting in doorways. The camera then follows the character as they leave the rain behind, ascending wooden steps and passing through a glowing doorway. Finally, the environment shifts into a flickering interior where the character approaches a central fire pit and a person sleeping peacefully on the floor.
